name: claude-super-auto
description: Autonomous idea-to-implementation workflow loop — adversarial discussion, auto-planning, auto-building with TDD, and convergence-based evaluation

metadata.description: Fully autonomous agent workflow: idea in, project out. Adversarial Proposer/Challenger debate → planning → TDD building → 4-dimension evaluation → loop until done.

plugins.name: claude-super-auto
plugins.description: Autonomous workflow loop with 3 agents (proposer, challenger, evaluator), 2 skills (discussion, autopilot-loop), and 1 command (/autopilot). Drop into any project for fully autonomous idea-to-implementation.
